mapper.sql: SELECT c.合同编号 AS contractId, c.签订时间 AS signDate, CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('总价包干', 'PACKAGE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('按量结算', 'UNIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0) THEN 'MIXED' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('总价包干', 'PACKAGE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'PACKAGE' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ci.报价模式 IN ('按量结算', 'UNIT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'UNIT' ELSE 'PACKAGE' END AS pricingType FROM CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN CONTRACT_ITEM ci ON ci.合同编号 = c.合同编号 WHERE c.合同状态 NOT IN ('待审核', '已拒绝') AND c.签订时间 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.合同编号, c.签订时间
mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(t.signDate, '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(t.signDate, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(t.signDate, '%Y-%m')
AS dateLabel, t.pricingType AS pricingType, COUNT(t.contractId) AS count FROM (
) t WHERE DATE(t.signDate) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(t.signDate) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY dateLabel, t.pricingType ORDER BY dateLabel ASC
